name: Jackie Morgan
title: Senior Software Engineer & Cloud Architect
tagline: Building reliable, scalable systems with maximum power.
summary: Full-stack engineer with a decade of experience designing distributed SaaS platforms, leading teams, and shipping products that scale. Passionate about clean architecture, developer experience, and pragmatic delivery.

highlights: Architected a multi-tenant platform serving 2M+ daily requests.
Cut p95 latency by 40% through caching and query optimization.
Built the event-driven analytics pipeline from the ground up.
Introduced CI/CD reducing deploy time from hours to minutes.

projects.name: OpenMetrics Dashboard
projects.description: Real-time observability dashboard for distributed systems.

projects.name: EdgeCache
projects.description: Lightweight edge caching layer with sub-millisecond reads.
